title: Instant Redstone
body:
Instant Redstone adds a custom variation for each redstone component, making it completely instant! You can make a gigantic redstone contraption that works extremely fast. It's perfect for big redstone computers or other logical applications.

**Blocks:**
- Instant Repeater
- Instant Redstone Torch
- Instant Comparator
- Pixel Block - Works the same as a redstone lamp, but recomended specificaly for redstone screens.

_Note: Instant redstone torches don't burn out._
